enemy_sprites.name: Indra
enemy_sprites.behavioral_type: independent movable vehicle with separate shielding

distinctive_elements: detailed sprite animation work for robot character
color depth exceeded typical Mega Drive limitations
surreal and energetic aesthetic matching darker progressive rock tone
hardware color tricks for expanded palette display

notes.animation_detail: Team prioritized intricate animations; designers worked to create maximum animations possible for sprites given robot design possibilities
notes.color_approach: Designers used hardware tricks to increase on-display colors; color management emphasized subtlety over raw numerical palette size
notes.development_philosophy: Created with intuition without copying other titles; custom software tools pushed Mega Drive hardware limits
notes.visual_reception: Graphics praised for detail, clarity, and perceived breakthrough of Mega Drive color limitations; backgrounds and cutscenes specifically noted as impressive
